pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh script specify this path
Calculated from task specifications: cylinder (π × 10² × 60 = 18849.56 mm³) minus groove removal (π × (10² - 8.5²) × 2.5 = 217.95 mm³) = 18631.61 mm³
Standard tolerance for CAD geometry verification; equals ±931.59 mm³
Calculated from shaft specifications: diameter 20mm (X,Y) × length 60mm (Z)
Standard tolerance for CAD bounding box verification
Task description specifies: 'groove center is 15 mm from the bottom face (Z=15)'
Task description: Pad to create cylindrical shaft, Groove to create O-ring groove via subtractive revolution

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic FreeCAD CAD design task with verified specifications. The task requires creating a cylindrical shaft with dimensions 20mm diameter × 60mm length (bounding box [20.0, 20.0, 60.0] mm) using a Pad feature. The expected final volume is 18631.7 mm³ (within 5% tolerance), calculated as a full cylinder (18849.56 mm³) minus an O-ring groove removal (217.95 mm³). The groove is centered at Z=15mm with dimensions 2.5mm wide (axial) × 1.5mm deep (radial), created using the Groove tool (subtractive revolution) to cut from R=10mm to R=8.5mm. The output file is saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/shaft_with_groove.FCStd. All metadata values have been independently verified against task specifications and mathematical calculations.
